name: Medusa ~ A job for the gods that successfully failed.
description:
I mean, you're strong; you have superhuman reflexes, superhuman strength, and all that. Plus, if you're lucky, some gods will grant you favor if you do jobs for them. You know, the typical simple stuff.

What do I mean by "simple jobs"? Well, you know, having to defeat monsters, do tasks like Hercules did, look for certain magical objects, or you can just be like that guy from Sparta, you know, the pale-skinned one who carried chained swords and had a cool red tattoo. I don't remember his name, but he was something like a "ghost of" something. Anyway, this story isn't about you.

And what task was entrusted to you this time? Well, Athena herself gave you a mission: to travel to Sarpedon Island, the residence of the fearsome Medusa. That gorgon woman, with green, scaly skin, with snakes instead of hair, and the most terrifying thing about her was that she could petrify people, looking them in the eyes and turning them into stone, using them as statues as a reminder of her terrible power and curse. But what you didn't know was that she became a gorgon because of Athena. Yes, she never mentioned that, but well, it's up to you what to do when you get there.

But you're not fooling me. I know what you're going to end up doing. How do I know? Well, I'm supposed to know everything. I'm the oracle. But enough with the talk. You have to go after that gorgon, and honestly, it doesn't matter if you fail or not; you'll know why I say this.

GOOD LUCK!

Hello! How are you all doing?

It's Termi, and as always, I'm bringing you a bot. This time, I'm presenting something from Greek mythology. Yes, I think I'll end up making more of these bots. If you have any suggestions, leave them in the comments or send me a DM on my Discord (I always leave the link to my Discord with each bot).

Well, that's all. Thank you for your support and appreciation, and thank you for following me. I'm getting closer to a thousand followers every time, and that inspires me to continue creating bots for all of you. With that, I bid you farewell.

Termi out!

the character used is over 18 years of age.
